description: Professional design career library covering major creative and design disciplines.

careers.name: Fashion Designer
careers.overview: Fashion Designer is a creative profession focused on innovation, aesthetics, problem solving and user-centered design.
careers.whyChoose: Excellent creative freedom, strong portfolio-based growth and opportunities across industries.
careers.eligibility: 10+2 from any stream. Design aptitude and portfolio development are beneficial.
careers.educationPath: Class 12 → B.Des/BFA/Design Degree → Internship → Professional Practice or Higher Studies.
careers.workEnvironment: Design studios, agencies, startups, brands, technology companies and freelance practice.
careers.futureScope: Strong demand due to digital products, branding, innovation and experience-driven businesses.
careers.aiImpact: AI assists with creative workflows but human creativity, research and design thinking remain critical.

careers.whyChoose: High demand and excellent growth.
careers.eligibility: 10+2 any stream

careers.workEnvironment: Tech companies and design studios
careers.futureScope: Excellent
careers.aiImpact: AI assists but does not replace user-centered design

careers.name: VFX Artist
careers.overview: Creates visual effects for films and media.
careers.whyChoose: Creative entertainment career.
careers.eligibility: 10+2 any stream
careers.educationPath: Animation/VFX courses
careers.workEnvironment: Studios and media companies
careers.futureScope: Growing OTT and gaming demand
careers.aiImpact: AI automates repetitive tasks

careers.name: Film Maker
careers.overview: Creates films and digital content.
careers.whyChoose: Storytelling and creative leadership.
careers.eligibility: 10+2 any stream
careers.educationPath: Film degree/diploma
careers.workEnvironment: Production houses and OTT
careers.futureScope: Strong due to OTT growth
careers.aiImpact: AI supports editing

careers.overview: Captures visual content for media and brands.

careers.eligibility: 10+2 any stream
careers.educationPath: Photography courses
careers.workEnvironment: Studios and freelance
careers.futureScope: Good digital content demand
careers.aiImpact: AI helps editing
